error.invalid_api_key: Enter simulator API key(s) exactly as configured for the Solcast integration in this dev container (for example: 1,2)
error.invalid_cloudiness_profile: Enter two numbers as cloudiness bias, cloud variability (for example: 0.0, 0.7)
error.invalid_shade_dimensions: Enter three positive numbers as height, width, distance (for example: 12, 8, 15)
error.invalid_shade_density_profile: Enter three ascending values from 0 to 1 for canopy density at 20%, 50%, and 80% sun-path depth through the shade object (for example: 0.3, 0.8, 1.0)
error.invalid_battery_power_limits: Enter two non-negative numbers as max charge, max discharge (for example: 5, 5)

user.title: Solcast PV SimCity simulator
user.description: Configure the simulator to model PV generation with realistic weather patterns

data.shade_density_profile: Shade object canopy density profile (sun-path depth factor: 20/50/80)

data_description.api_key: Configure this exactly the same as the Solcast integration API key list in this dev container. Use comma-separated keys where needed (for example: 1,2).
data_description.season: Use Auto for real seasonal progression or force a fixed season profile.
data_description.cloudiness_profile: Comma-separated cloudiness bias and cloud variability. Typical values are -0.5 to +0.5 for bias and 0 to 2 for variability.
data_description.estimated_actuals_uncertainty_pct: Deterministic 1σ jitter applied to simulated estimated actuals. Set to 0 for exact intervals. Typical range: 0-5.
data_description.shade_dimensions: Comma-separated height, width, distance of the simulated shade object in metres — for example: 12, 8, 15. The angular width seen by the sun is calculated from the physical width and distance.
data_description.shade_azimuth_deg: Direction of the tree from the array using Solcast azimuth: 0=N, +90=W, -90=E, +/-180=S.
data_description.shade_opacity: Fraction of direct sunlight blocked when the sun is behind the tree. Set to 0 to disable shade.
data_description.shade_density_profile: Comma-separated relative shade density at 20%, 50%, and 80% penetration. 0.0 is least influence (where the sun path first intersects) and 1.0 is deepest penetration toward the core (typically near centerline). Values must be ascending in the 0-1 range. Lower early values produce softer edges; higher late values produce a denser core. For a hard-edged solid object, use 1.0, 1.0, 1.0.
data_description.export_factor: Fraction of surplus generation that can be exported to grid.
data_description.export_limit_kw: Hard cap for grid export power.
data_description.battery_power_limits_kw: Comma-separated maximum charge and discharge power in kW.
data_description.house_load_kw: Base household demand used by the simulator.
data_description.free_charge_start: Local start time for free charging from the grid.
data_description.free_charge_end: Local end time for free charging from the grid. Set start and end to the same time to disable the feature.

error.invalid_api_key: Enter simulator API key(s) exactly as configured for the Solcast integration in this dev container (for example: 1,2)
error.invalid_cloudiness_profile: Enter two numbers as cloudiness bias, cloud variability (for example: 0.0, 0.7)
error.invalid_shade_dimensions: Enter three positive numbers as height, width, distance (for example: 12, 8, 15)
error.invalid_shade_density_profile: Enter three ascending values from 0 to 1 for canopy density at 20%, 50%, and 80% sun-path depth through the shade object (for example: 0.3, 0.8, 1.0)
error.invalid_battery_power_limits: Enter two non-negative numbers as max charge, max discharge (for example: 5, 5)

data.shade_density_profile: Shade object canopy density profile (sun-path depth factor: 20/50/80)

data_description.api_key: Configure this exactly the same as the Solcast integration API key list in this dev container. Use comma-separated keys where needed (for example: 1,2).
data_description.season: Use Auto for real seasonal progression or force a fixed season profile.
data_description.cloudiness_profile: Comma-separated cloudiness bias and cloud variability. Typical values are -0.5 to +0.5 for bias and 0 to 2 for variability.
data_description.estimated_actuals_uncertainty_pct: Deterministic 1σ jitter applied to simulated estimated actuals. Set to 0 for exact intervals. Typical range: 0-5.
data_description.shade_dimensions: Comma-separated height, width, distance of the simulated shade object in metres — for example: 12, 8, 15. The angular width seen by the sun is calculated from the physical width and distance.
data_description.shade_azimuth_deg: Direction of the tree from the array using Solcast azimuth: 0=N, +90=W, -90=E, +/-180=S.
data_description.shade_opacity: Fraction of direct sunlight blocked when the sun is behind the tree. Set to 0 to disable shade.
data_description.shade_density_profile: Comma-separated relative shade density at 20%, 50%, and 80% penetration. 0.0 is least influence (where the sun path first intersects) and 1.0 is deepest penetration toward the core (typically near centerline). Values must be ascending in the 0-1 range. Lower early values produce softer edges; higher late values produce a denser core. For a hard-edged solid object, use 1.0, 1.0, 1.0.
data_description.export_factor: Fraction of surplus generation that can be exported to grid.
data_description.export_limit_kw: Hard cap for grid export power.
data_description.battery_power_limits_kw: Comma-separated maximum charge and discharge power in kW.
data_description.house_load_kw: Base household demand used by the simulator.
data_description.free_charge_start: Local start time for free charging from the grid.
data_description.free_charge_end: Local end time for free charging from the grid. Set start and end to the same time to disable the feature.

api_key_mismatch.title: SimCity API key list does not match Solcast

init.title: Resolve SimCity API key mismatch
init.description: Your SimCity API key list ({simcity_api_keys}) does not match your Solcast integration API key list ({solcast_api_keys}). To fix this issue: Choose 'Recommended: Synchronise with Solcast' to apply the recommended setup, or choose 'Advanced: Keep mismatch' only if you intentionally want different API key lists.

abort.entry_not_found: The SimCity configuration entry was not found.
abort.missing_solcast: No Solcast integration entry was found to copy API keys from.
